EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for leads for an FUL policy at the second attempt stage when they have previously provided a renewal date.
EmailTemplate.name: Renewal Date Lead (FUL)_2nd Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Requested insurance quote follow up
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’ve not been able to reach you to provide you with an insurance quote.
It would be useful to know more about your business, so I can understand what cover you might require.
Some key benefits of our package are:
- Unlimited retroactive cover - protects you against claims arising from work you completed before your current insurance policy began. - Worldwide Jurisdiction cover - ensures that you're protected almost anywhere that your work may take you. - Nil excess - guarantees no unexpected out-of-pocket expenses in the event of a claim. - Sub-Contractors - includes cover for up to 3 business-facing sub-contractors (BFSCs), provided they hold the same levels of cover as you.
However, it would be good to discuss your requirements to make sure this is the best policy for you. Is there a good time for me to give you a call?
Alternatively, you can contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
You can also get a quote online via our website www.kingsbridge.co.uk.
I look forward to hearing from you soon.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
